title: AB 1400 would guarantee comprehensive, high-quality health care for all Californians as a human right, leading the nation in the larger fight for health care justice
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1400 aims to guarantee comprehensive, high-quality health care for all Californians as a human right.",
    "The CalCare program establishes an improved Medicare for All-type health care system.",
    "A single-payer health system is posited to affirm the belief that health care is a human right.",
    "Nearly 3 million Californians lack health insurance despite gains made under the Affordable Care Act.",
    "For-profit insurance companies and health care systems are reporting record-breaking profits during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Medical-related bankruptcies are at an all-time high in California.",
    "A single-payer health care system would provide health care for all Californians without network restrictions, deductibles, or copayments.",
    "Two thirds of bankruptcies in the United States are tied to medical debt.",
    "The pandemic has demonstrated that employment-based health care is ineffective.",
    "CalCare will provide health care to all Californians, regardless of employment, income, immigration status, race, or gender.",
    "CalCare will ensure that public health is prioritized over profits for insurance corporations.",
    "The CalCare program could save families and businesses thousands in annual health care costs by eliminating unnecessary costs of the current system.",
    "57 percent of Californians supported replacing private insurance with government-provided coverage before the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "High spending on health care in the United States correlates with poorer health outcomes, including shorter life expectancy and greater prevalence of chronic conditions.",
    "California's growing senior population necessitates more comprehensive health care and long-term care supports."
  ]
}
```
